channel.title: Saas on Ned Dwyer
channel.description: Recent content in Saas on Ned Dwyer

item.title: I Vibe Coded Qualtrics in a Weekend
item.description: I had a few hours free on Sunday, so I decided to vibe code Qualtrics. Surveys, branching logic, response collection, a dashboard. The lot. By the end of the afternoon I had something that genuinely worked.
